buyers.thesis: Roark acquired ServiceMaster Brands for $5.5B, rolling up fragmented cleaning and restoration services including ServiceMaster Clean, Merry Maids, and ServiceMaster Restore. Springer fits as a Midwest tuck-in to expand floor care density in Iowa.

Riverside acquired milliCare Floor & Textile Care (commercial carpet/floor care, $25M rev, 40+ locations) as add-on to their Clintar platform. Springer's Des Moines territory fills a Midwest gap in milliCare's franchise network.

Acquired Kleen-Tech Services (national janitorial, 2000 employees, 30+ states) in September 2025. Actively pursuing M&A in janitorial/cleaning. Springer adds specialized floor care capability to their commercial cleaning platform.

Acquired TriState Janitorial specifically for floor care specialization. Actively acquiring commercial cleaning companies with floor care expertise. Springer's Iowa market extends their geographic reach westward.

ABM (NYSE: ABM) is a $8B+ facility services company. Regularly acquires specialized cleaning/janitorial operators. Springer's floor care specialization in Des Moines adds Midwest density to ABM's national platform.

Cintas (Nasdaq: CTAS) just announced $5.5B acquisition of UniFirst in March 2026. Expanding facility services capabilities. Springer's floor care services complement Cintas's uniform and facility services offering.

COIT operates 100+ locations providing carpet cleaning, floor care, and restoration services. Iowa market fills a Midwest territory gap. Springer's 41-year brand and recurring customer base are attractive franchise/acquisition targets.

Stanley Steemer is the largest carpet/floor cleaning franchise in the US with 300+ locations. Springer's Des Moines market and floor care specialization make it a natural territory acquisition or conversion.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Stanley Steemer growth strategy

buyers.thesis: Marsden is a large Midwest-based facility services company with multiple janitorial and cleaning brands. Springer's Des Moines floor care business is geographically adjacent and operationally complementary.
Pritchard is a growing facility services company backed by PE, actively acquiring regional cleaning operators. Springer adds specialized floor care capabilities and Iowa market presence.
